summary: Globally recognized project management certification focused on leading teams, planning, budget, schedule, quality, procurement, governance, risks, stakeholders, and business value.
best_for: team leads moving into project leadership
good_match_if: user wants project management career growth
user wants a globally recognized PM credential
user already works on projects and wants leadership credibility
user wants structured knowledge across planning, execution, governance, and value delivery
avoid_if: user is a complete beginner with no project management foundation
user wants a specialized analytics, CRM, or DevOps path
user wants only entry-level project certification
what_user_will_study: how to build and lead high-performing teams
how to plan scope, budget, resources, schedule, and quality
how to assess and manage risks
how to engage stakeholders and manage changes
how to align projects with business value
career_benefits: supports growth into project manager and senior project leadership roles
improves credibility for managing complex projects
helps demonstrate broad project delivery knowledge
duration_format: 4-day intensive boot camp, classroom/live online/self-paced options, 35 contact hours

summary: Structured project management certification path focused on PRINCE2 principles, terminology, roles, staged delivery, governance, and controlled execution in business environments.
best_for: professionals working in structured delivery environments
good_match_if: user wants a structured, process-oriented project management method
user works in organizations that value governance and stage-based delivery
user wants both foundation and practitioner progression
avoid_if: user wants Agile-first facilitation instead of structured project governance
user wants analytics, DevOps, CRM, or business analysis specialization
user wants a pure beginner credential with lighter terminology load
what_user_will_study: the PRINCE2 framework and terminology
how structured project delivery works
how to tailor the method to different project environments
how staged governance improves delivery control
career_benefits: helps validate structured project management capability
useful for organizations using formal governance methods
supports project delivery roles in public and private sectors
duration_format: 4-day intensive training, exam prep, classroom/live online/self-paced, 35 contact hours

summary: Entry-level project management certification for people starting careers as project managers or project team members, aligned with PMBOK concepts, processes, and terminology.

helps build confidence and terminology for PM roles
supports transition toward more advanced project certifications later
